title: Cale (clone trooper)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Cale}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image=[[File:Cale.jpg]] |name=Cale |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]{{SWE|characters|jangofett|Jango Fett}} |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin=Tan |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]{{TCWComicCite|6.47|Lockdown (comic story)}} **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|This is ''useless''. Take him back to his cell, ''Cale''.''"
"''Aye, sir.|[[Cody/Legends|Cody]] and Cale|}} '''Cale''' was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] who served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. ==Biography== [[File:Volan_Das_helmet.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Volan Das/Legends|Volan Das]] with Cale's [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]]]] In about [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], Cale was posted aboard the [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Tempestuous]]'', a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] that housed a [[Prison/Legends|prison]] which contained various wanted [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. After the [[Iktotchi/Legends|Iktotchi]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] [[Volan Das/Legends|Volan Das]] was captured by Republic forces while [[Raid on the Republic hypermatter refinery|attacking]] a [[Hypermatter/Legends|hypermatter]] [[Unidentified Republic hypermatter refinery|refinery]], he was taken to the ''Tempestuous'' and escorted to a cell by Cale and fellow [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Reed (clone trooper)|Reed]]. However, moments later Das and the prisoner [[Arlain Zee]] [[Riot aboard the Tempestuous|escaped]] from their cells, and the pair attacked and incapacitated Cale and Reed. Das and Zee then stole their [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] [[Clone trooper armor/Legends|armors]]. Zee took Reed's [[Armor/Legends|armor]] while Das put on Cale's armor, until the Iktotchi realized he could not fit his head into the [[Human/Legends|Human]]-sized [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]]. ==Appearances== *{{TCWComicCite|6.47|Lockdown (comic story)}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Clone troopers]] [[Category:Males]]
